# tplinkeasysmart_port_pvids (Data Source)

Read the 802.1Q PVID assigned to each switch port.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "tplinkeasysmart_port_pvids" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `pvids` (Attributes List) Per-port PVID assignments reported by the switch. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pvids))

<a id="nestedatt--pvids"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pvids`

Read-Only:

- `port_id` (Number) Physical switch port number.
- `pvid` (Number) Current PVID assigned to the port.
